sources.excerpt: The owner site identifies the Fairfax restaurant and links separate Lunch, Dinner, Gluten Sensitive Lunch, and Gluten Sensitive Dinner menus.
notes: This page establishes that all four reviewed PDFs are current restaurant-controlled sources.

sources.excerpt: Fifty-three food products appear across the two food pages; cocktail, beer, wine, boat-history, pricing, and undercooking language are not food products or allergen warnings.
notes: All four pages were rendered and visually inspected.
Directly named ingredients and unambiguous formulation terms support positive signals only; this is not a complete allergen matrix.
The raw-or-undercooked footnote is a foodborne-illness notice and was not converted to mayContain.

sources.excerpt: Fifty-two food products appear across the two food pages, including dinner-only Jambalaya Pasta, Crab Cake & Filet Mignon, Low Country Beef Back Ribs, Filet Mignon & Bearnaise, Blackened Prime Rib, and Loaded Baked Potato.
notes: All four pages were rendered and visually inspected.
Overlapping lunch and dinner presentations were consolidated where the named product and formulation were the same.
The Drunken Rib Eye remains configurable because its lunch and dinner side compositions differ.

sources.excerpt: The source says its options use current supplier information, warns that gluten-containing food can contact other products in shared preparation areas, and says no item can be guaranteed completely gluten free.
notes: Both pages were rendered and visually inspected.
The warning supports mayContain gluten only for products represented on this gluten-sensitive menu; it is not a restaurant-wide full allergen matrix.
The separately named kids Gluten Free Penne Pasta & Red Sauce is retained as a distinct product.

sources.excerpt: The dinner source repeats the supplier-information and shared-preparation gluten warning and publishes thirty-three product presentations, including documented gluten-free bread and penne modifications.
notes: Both pages were rendered and visually inspected.
Only overlapping products actually listed on a gluten-sensitive surface receive mayContain gluten.

sources.excerpt: Current Olo shell titled Artie's - Order Online; its server HTML contains loading infrastructure rather than menu rows.
notes: The historical vendor API URL in the frozen data returned HTTP 403 during recheck, so it was not used as current item or allergen evidence.
The owner-linked PDFs provide the authoritative current menu boundary.
